# Ignition Nova — Elite Digital Marketing Agency

> Ignition Nova is a digital marketing agency specializing in Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), Technical SEO, High-Performance Web Development, and Data Analytics & CRO. We guarantee measurable improvements in organic traffic and lead generation within 150 days.

## About

Ignition Nova bridges the gap between technical excellence and business outcomes. Our team combines deep engineering expertise with cutting-edge marketing strategy to help mid-market and enterprise companies dominate both traditional and AI-powered search.

## Services

- [Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)](https://www.ignitionnova.com/services/generative-engine-optimization): Optimize content and authority signals for AI search engines including ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, and Claude.
- [Technical SEO & Core Web Vitals](https://www.ignitionnova.com/services/technical-seo-core-web-vitals): Forensic-level technical audits, perfect Lighthouse scores, schema markup, and crawl optimization.
- [High-Performance Web Development](https://www.ignitionnova.com/services/high-performance-web-development): Blazing-fast websites built with Next.js and Astro that load in under 1 second and convert at 2x industry averages.
- [Data Analytics & CRO](https://www.ignitionnova.com/services/data-analytics-cro): Enterprise-grade analytics with GA4, server-side tracking, attribution modeling, and systematic A/B testing programs.

## Key Facts

- Location: Berlin, Germany
- Founded: 2020
- Clients Served: 200+
- Guarantee: Measurable results within 150 days
- Pricing: Engagements from $5,000/month to $50,000+/month

## Expertise Areas

- Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)
- AI Search Visibility & LLM Citation Optimization
- Technical SEO & Core Web Vitals
- Entity & Knowledge Graph Optimization
- Next.js & Astro Web Development
- GA4 & Server-Side Tracking
- Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO)
- Content Authority Architecture
- E-E-A-T Signal Optimization
